task_completion.description: Verify that the three required layers ('OUTLINE', 'WELLS', 'LABELS') are created with their respective colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the LibreCAD Layer List panel, there should be layers named 'OUTLINE' (White/Black depending on background), 'WELLS' (Cyan), and 'LABELS' (Yellow).

task_completion.description: Verify that the rectangular plate footprint is drawn on the OUTLINE layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A large rectangle representing the microplate footprint should be visible in the main drawing area, matching the OUTLINE layer color.

task_completion.description: Verify that 96 circular wells are drawn in an 8x12 grid on the WELLS layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A grid of 96 circles (8 rows by 12 columns) should be visible inside the rectangle, drawn in Cyan (the WELLS layer color).

task_completion.description: Verify that the text labels 'A1', 'A12', 'H1', and 'H12' are added on the LABELS layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Yellow text labels 'A1' (top-left), 'A12' (top-right), 'H1' (bottom-left), and 'H12' (bottom-right) should be visible near the corner wells.

task_completion.description: Verify that the drawing is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreCAD window title bar should display 'microplate_template.dxf', or a file manager/terminal should show this file existing in /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/.

integrity.description: Verify that LibreCAD was actually used to create or view the drawing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreCAD application interface open with the drawing visible, rather than just terminal commands generating a file.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the LibreCAD GUI or its internal command line to construct the geometry.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of tool usage in LibreCAD (e.g., command line history at the bottom of the LibreCAD window showing 'rect', 'circle', 'layer' commands, or mouse interactions with the toolbar).

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply copy a pre-existing completed DXF file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show the step-by-step construction of the drawing (creating layers, drawing shapes) rather than a single step where the finished file suddenly appears.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The microplate dimensions are 127.76 mm width by 85.48 mm height. The 96 wells are arranged in an 8x12 grid with a 9.0 mm pitch (spacing). The top-left well (A1) is centered at X: 14.38, Y: -11.24. Well diameter is 6.5 mm (radius 3.25 mm). Layer colors: OUTLINE is White (Color 7), WELLS is Cyan (Color 4), LABELS is Yellow (Color 2).
